classData.comment:
/**
 * @module ai/services/graph/conceptSliceBuilder
 * @summary Read-only Sandman-v2 concept-slice builder and handoff renderer.
 *
 * Owner contract: render the current Native Edge Graph concept slice as boot structure before
 * prose. The exported `buildConceptSlice()` contract is the shared consumable for downstream
 * renderers: input is a bounded concept neighborhood plus four-axis annotations, output is a
 * render tree. This helper performs zero graph writes and mints no node or edge classes.
 */
classData.name: ai/services/graph/conceptSliceBuilder
classData.summary:
Read-only Sandman-v2 concept-slice builder and handoff renderer.

Owner contract: render the current Native Edge Graph concept slice as boot structure before
prose. The exported `buildConceptSlice()` contract is the shared consumable for downstream
renderers: input is a bounded concept neighborhood plus four-axis annotations, output is a
render tree. This helper performs zero graph writes and mints no node or edge classes.
Returns the first non-empty timestamp-like value from a payload.
classData.name: getTimestamp

classData.summary: Tests whether a payload timestamp sits inside the requested handoff window.
classData.name: isInsideWindow

classData.summary: Normalizes graph node records into the small render-consumable shape.
classData.name: normalizeConceptSliceNode

classData.summary: Normalizes graph edge records into the small render-consumable shape.
classData.name: normalizeConceptSliceEdge

classData.summary: Detects which of the four Golden Path v2 annotation axes are present.
classData.name: detectConceptSliceAxes

classData.summary: Formats axis-presence metadata for compact markdown tables.
classData.name: formatConceptSliceAxes

classData.summary: Parses the capability-gap payload shape used by `GapInferenceEngine`.
classData.name: parseConceptSliceGaps

classData.summary: Returns a concept id when either endpoint of an edge is a CONCEPT node.
classData.name: getConceptEndpoint

classData.summary: Returns stable node display text without making the renderer depend on one schema.
classData.name: getNodeTitle

classData.comment:
/**
 * @summary Builds the shared Sandman-v2 concept-slice render tree.
 *
 * The builder reads the in-memory graph projection only. Missing sections render as empty-state
 * rows so handoff generation never depends on graph completeness.
 *
 * @param {Object} options
 * @param {Object} options.graphService GraphService-compatible object.
 * @param {Object} [options.sessionWindow={}] Optional `{since, until}` edge/node timestamp window.
 * @param {Number} [options.conceptLimit=10] Maximum concepts rendered.
 * @param {Number} [options.edgeDeltaLimit=10] Maximum edge deltas rendered.
 * @param {Number} [options.gapLimit=10] Maximum concept gaps rendered.
 * @param {Date|String} [options.capturedAt=new Date()] Capture timestamp.
 * @returns {Object} Render tree with `conceptsTouched`, `edgeDeltas`, and `perConceptGaps`.
 */
classData.summary:
Builds the shared Sandman-v2 concept-slice render tree.

The builder reads the in-memory graph projection only. Missing sections render as empty-state
rows so handoff generation never depends on graph completeness.
classData.name: buildConceptSlice
escapeCell

classData.summary: Renders the shared concept-slice tree as the structure-first handoff section.
classData.name: renderConceptSliceSection

classData.summary: Builds and renders the concept slice, degrading to no section on failure.
classData.name: renderConceptSliceHandoffSection
